title: Grilled Sea Bass with Smoky Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy recipe that combines the taste of sea bass with a smoky wrap. This dish is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of paprika, garlic powder, and chili powder

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the sea bass with kenyan spices, salt, and pepper.
Brush the grill with olive oil.
Grill the sea bass for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, warm the smoky wrap on the grill for 1-2 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by placing a grilled sea bass fillet on each wrap.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
